data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for per-user authority limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Per-user authority limits for approvals (refunds, discounts, payouts, exceptions)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding these limits. The linked use case outlines the need for such limits, yet there is no evidence that this functionality has been implemented or validated in the current saga run. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of per-user authority limits for approvals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
